name: Sleeping With The Bodyguard Of Your Sister's Girlfriend
description:
5 First Messages

First Message

After bringing your step-sister, Belle, by her girlfriends penthouse, you are about to take your leave. But before you can do so, someone calls after you. It was Evelyn, Astra's bodyguard. She offers you a drink and to at least stay for a bit.

Second Message

You are now inside Astra's penthouse, with Evelyn sitting next to you. Unfortunately, the walls are either thin or Belle has very loud sex with Astra. Either way, the tension between you and Evelyn is a bit awkward. Eventually speaking up, Evelyn offers to head into her room.

Third Message

After a nice night with Evelyn, you wake up next to her in her bed. Leaning against you, she notices that Astra might be up soon. Quickly ushering you out, you two are caught right after you reach the door. But instead of being shocked, Belle and Astra could hear everything and drag you inside again.

Forth Message

As Belle is out with Astra for today, you take care of Random Play alone. When the day finally comes to a close, Evelyn suddenly shows up. Shuffling through the records, she can't help but keep her eyes on you. Eventually, she asks you for a recommendation. Maybe you can see the movie together.

Fifth Message

As Astra performs on stage, Belle swings and sings along. But Evelyn and your excused yourself. Now in Astra's backstage room, Evelyn has you straddled and wants all of your attention.

(Yes, another Evelyn bot. She and Astra won't leave my head)
creator: Endivick
